data.title: STARS held successful inaugural research & education conference featuring athlete Bo Jackson sharing stuttering journey.
data.description: Former two-sport all-star athlete Bo Jackson opened up about his personal journey with stuttering while commemorating the launch and research milestone of STARS (Stuttering Treatment and Research Society) in Laguna Niguel, California on September 18, 2025. The organization achieved its first milestone with the successful completion of specific research, but the exact numbers were not disclosed.

data.title: PLANTERS® introduces new trail mixes: White Chocolate Macadamia Nut and Chocolate Caramel Pecan Crunch, offering quality ingredients.
data.description: Introducing the latest offerings from PLANTERS® - the White Chocolate Macadamia Nut and Chocolate Caramel Pecan Crunch trail mixes. These delectable blends showcase premium ingredients, highlighting the nuts in each variety. Released on September 18, 2025, in Austin, Minn., the new trail mixes cater to those who crave innovative flavors and top-notch snacks. The PLANTERS® brand aims to appeal to enthusiasts seeking unique taste experiences by combining quality nuts with irresistible ingredients.

data.title: MATIC price hits $0.38 pivot, showing mixed tech signals. Traders eye potential bounce at oversold levels.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Polygon (MATIC) is currently trading at $0.38, showing signs of bearish momentum according to indicators. Despite this, the Relative Strength Index (RSI) indicates a potential oversold condition, presenting a possible opportunity for traders to capitalize on a bounce back.

data.title: Aurality Inc. to debut Empress3D scanner at EUHA 2025 conference, capable of producing accurate 3D ear impressions.
data.description: A company based in Herndon, Virginia called Aurality Inc. has introduced its leading handheld scanner called Empress3D to European markets at EUHA 2025 conference. This advanced device is one of the earliest handheld digital in-ear scanners that can create precise 3D ear impressions in one go. It is tailored for multiple uses like hearing aids, tailor-made earplugs, and in-ear monitors. EUHA, a prominent international event for hearing aid acousticians, showcased this groundbreaking technology.

data.title: Palo Alto Networks launches AI-generated ad campaign "Be A Genius. Deploy Bravely" showcasing secure innovation.
data.description: Palo Alto Networks, a leading global cybersecurity company, has unveiled its new campaign "Be A Genius. Deploy Bravely" in Santa Clara, California on September 18, 2025. The initiative aims to promote the use of AI in advertising and urges customers to embrace this technology fearlessly. As per reports, the company's stock is listed on NASDAQ under the symbol PANW. This announcement signifies the company's effort to adapt to the evolving advertising landscape by incorporating artificial intelligence.

data.title: Investor grows 1K to 1M with BNB topping $1K - a success story emphasizing long-term crypto holding tactics.
data.description: A fortunate individual who invested $1,000 early in BNB has seen their investment grow to $1 million as the token reached the historic price point of $1,000. This success story underscores the effectiveness of long-term holding strategies in the volatile crypto markets, showcasing the potential for substantial gains through patience and conviction.

data.title: Dow Jones rose ahead of jobless claims, Nvidia surged on Intel stake. Stock market live coverage.
data.description: On Thursday, the Dow Jones index experienced an increase, particularly in anticipation of the weekly jobless claims. Nvidia stock witnessed a significant surge due to its stake in Intel. The stock market displayed positive momentum for the day, with the Dow performing well following a rate change announcement. Nvidia's impressive performance was driven by its investment in Intel. The overall market outlook seemed optimistic, with investors closely monitoring the jobless claims data.

data.title: Stock futures surge after mixed performance post Fed rate cut. Nvidia to acquire stake in Intel. Dow Jones signals new highs.
data.description: Following a mixed close of the stock market on Tuesday following the Federal Reserve's rate cut, futures saw a rally. Nvidia announced plans to purchase a stake in Intel. The Dow Jones futures indicated potential new highs on the second day of the reaction to the Fed's decision.

data.title: Health Canada grants Quantum BioPharma a product license (PN 80144141) for Qlarity™, enhancing energy and cognitive performance.
data.description: In Toronto on September 18, 2025, Quantum BioPharma Ltd. received a Product License (PN 80144141) from Health Canada for their natural health product, Qlarity. The biopharmaceutical company, listed on NASDAQ as QNTM, CSE as QNTM, and FRA as 0K91, focuses on developing treatments for neurodegenerative and metabolic disorders, as well as alcohol misuse disorders. Their product Qlarity, previously available in the US under the brand unbuzzd™, has been granted permission for sale in Canada. Quantum BioPharma has a range of drug candidates in various stages of development to address these challenging health issues.
